## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss programmatic/productized SEO strategy for Lovable with growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai has deep expertise in technical, content, and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Focus on two initial lanes: editorial/programmatic content and a template library](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Quick wins (e.g. competitor pages) needed to demonstrate value, with longer-term strategy in parallel](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Lovable's current website and content quality needs significant improvement](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's SEO Capabilities

  - [Team includes former heads of SEO from major companies (TripAdvisor, G2)](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Expertise spans technical, content, and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [In-house workflow engine for automating SEO processes](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Design engineers capable of building high-quality pages](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Current Lovable SEO Issues

  - [Core pages not being indexed due to 5xx server errors](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Low-quality content from previous agency work](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Shallow website with limited depth and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Poor blog quality needing complete overhaul](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)

### Proposed SEO Strategy

  - [Start with competitor comparison pages as quick win](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
  - [Develop comprehensive template library categorized by function, industry, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Improve existing how-to content or create from scratch if quality is too low](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Expand website content 10x in size and depth](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)

### Template Library Concept

  - [Combine elements of Dribbble and Mobbin for inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Categorize templates by function, industry, design elements](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Aim to capture traffic currently going to template marketplaces](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)

### Content Analysis and Generation

  - [Use AI tools (e.g. Exa AI) for deep research and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Analyze user sessions and prompts to understand intent and categorize content](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Generate detailed, engineer-vetted prompts for high-quality app templates](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to conduct deep dives and deliver initial plan early next week](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Rachel to send technical conversation snippets for context](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Identify key stakeholders for information gathering](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration with Lovable's product team on components library](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Discuss with Elena's team about founder ecosystem to avoid duplication](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Aim for a quick win to be shipped by early October](https://fathom.video/share/byQTDZGJAk3z8Q6AdAsAjCHBUeK-MBC2?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
